name: DHT22 (AM2302)

arduino_library.name: DHT sensor library
arduino_library.author: Adafruit
arduino_library.install: Arduino IDE → Tools → Manage Libraries → Search 'DHT sensor library'

common_issues: Getting NaN values: Missing pull-up resistor on DATA pin
Sensor not responding: Check wiring, ensure 2+ second delay between reads
Erratic readings: Power supply noise, add decoupling capacitor (0.1µF)
Long wire issues: Use shielded cable or lower value pull-up (4.7kΩ)

no_data: Check pull-up resistor (4.7k-10k) between DATA and VCC
Verify pin number in code matches physical connection
wrong_values: Verify sensor is genuine DHT22 (not DHT11)
Wait 2 seconds after power-on before first reading
Add 0.1µF capacitor between VCC and GND
